enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who are the singers of the song Aiyyayo Maattikittenae?

The song is sung by Benny Dayal, Naresh Iyer, and Suchitra.

Which movie features the song Aiyyayo Maattikittenae?

The song is from the Tamil movie Poda Podi, released in 2012.

Who composed the music for Poda Podi?

The music for the movie was composed by Dharan Kumar.

Who are the lead actors in the movie Poda Podi?

The lead roles in the movie were played by Silambarasan and Varalaxmi Sarathkumar.

What is the theme of the song Aiyyayo Maattikittenae?

The song portrays a playful and romantic interaction between the lead characters, expressing their love and joy.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Aiyyayo Maattikittenae from the 2012 Tamil movie Poda Podi, starring Silambarasan and Varalaxmi Sarathkumar, is a lively and romantic number. Composed by Dharan Kumar and sung by Benny Dayal, Naresh Iyer, and Suchitra, the song captures the playful and joyous essence of love. The lyrics by Vignesh Shivan add a charming touch to the vibrant melody. This track is a delightful addition to any celebration or dance playlist, evoking feelings of happiness and excitement.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Aiyyayo Maattikittenae, a vibrant and energetic song from the movie Poda Podi, captivates listeners with its lively beats and engaging lyrics. Sung by the talented trio Benny Dayal, Naresh Iyer, and Suchitra, and composed by Dharan Kumar, this track is a celebration of love and joy. Its catchy rhythm and playful tone make it a favorite for dance enthusiasts and music lovers alike.
stanzaMeanings: If you are Romeo, I will be Juliet. If you are Majnu, I will be Laila.
If you are in Afghanistan, I will be in America. I will become a superstar.
I am a beautiful angry bird. I will catch your face and lift you up.
Oh no, oh no! I have changed. I have become crazy for you.
When you do something, I don't feel good about it. This chapter is something no one understands.
This is not the life I want. This is not my dream. I never thought I would feel this way. Love is not what it seems.
If you are Laila, I will be Majnu. I will be Sajahana if you are Mumtaz.
If you go overboard, I will go for an innings. If you become a villain, I will become a superstar.
On my day, I will always be your king.
Dance, oh girl... You are the one who has captured me...
Oh no, oh no! I have changed.
Oh no, oh no! I have changed. I have become crazy for you.
